name: cofense-vision
label: Cofense Vision
description: Cofense Vision is a security solution designed to help organizations quickly detect, locate, and quarantine phishing emails across all employee inboxes.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.description: Specify the URL of the Cofense Vision server to connect and perform automated operations.
fields.name: hostname
fields.tooltip: Specify the URL of the Cofense Vision server to connect and perform automated operations.

fields.title: Username
fields.description: Specify the name of the client to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations
fields.name: username
fields.tooltip: Specify the name of the client to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations

fields.title: Password
fields.description: Specify the password of the client to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations
fields.name: password
fields.tooltip: Specify the password of the client to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.

operations.title: Search Email
operations.description: Search for emails from Cofense Vision based on the email subject and sender email address you have provided.

parameters.title: Email Subject
parameters.description: Specify the comma-separated email subjects based on which you want to retrieve emails.
parameters.name: emailSubject
parameters.tooltip: Specify the comma-separated email subjects based on which you want to retrieve emails.

parameters.title: Sender Email Address
parameters.description: Specify the comma-separated sender email address based on which you want to retrieve emails.
parameters.name: senderEmailAddress
parameters.tooltip: Specify the comma-separated sender email address based on which you want to retrieve emails.

operations.title: Quarantine Email
operations.description: Quarantine an emails in Cofense Vision based on the recipient address and internal message ID you have provided.

parameters.title: Recipient Address
parameters.description: Specify the comma-separated recipient email address of the account containing the emails to be quarantined.
parameters.name: recipientAddress
parameters.tooltip: Specify the comma-separated recipient email address of the account containing the emails to be quarantined.

parameters.title: Internet Message ID
parameters.description: Specify the ID of any emails in that account to be quarantined, with each internetMessageId enclosed in angle brackets.
parameters.name: internetMessageId
parameters.tooltip: Specify the ID of any emails in that account to be quarantined, with each internetMessageId enclosed in angle brackets. For e.g <513C8CD8-E593-4DC4-82BF-6202E8AC95CB@example.com>
